purpose: Build reusable assets outside ElevenLabs Flows, then import approved components into the Flow canvas for low-res lip-sync video assembly.

assetPolicy.draftResolution: Use the lowest useful review resolution for wiring and lip-sync QA.
assetPolicy.filenameRule: Generated review assets must use immutable timestamped filenames.
assetPolicy.sourceOfTruth: This manifest, production-locks.json, and video-render-plan-20260616-224431.json are the durable source before the Flow canvas.
assetPolicy.noSecrets: Do not store ElevenLabs API keys or signed temporary URLs in this repo.

characters.label: Character A — Curious Newport Beach Mom
characters.role: Curious friend who asks for the secret.
characters.seatLock: Character A stays on the same assigned recumbent bike, same seat, same side, in every scene.
characters.lookLock: Caucasian Newport Beach mom, just under 30, brunette ponytail, glowing healthy skin, athletic build.
characters.wardrobeLock: Darker mocha/taupe high-end logo-free athleisure, Alo/Vuori/Lululemon-inspired, no sunglasses.

voice.label: Jessica - Playful, Bright, Warm
voice.direction: Bright, playful, bubbly, natural friend energy. Not salesy.

characters.label: Character B — Meal Prep Revolution Mom
characters.role: Organized friend who uses Meal Prep Revolution.
characters.seatLock: Character B stays on the same assigned recumbent bike, same seat, same side, in every scene.
characters.lookLock: Caucasian Newport Beach mom, just under 30, blonde beach-wave hair, blue-eye read, glowing healthy skin, athletic feminine build.
characters.wardrobeLock: Sand/taupe high-end logo-free athleisure with muted teal accent, not white or underwear-like, no sunglasses.

voice.label: Anya - Casual and friendly
voice.direction: Warm, confident, organized, relaxed secret-sharing delivery. Not a hard ad read.

lines.text: Okay, seriously... you look amazing. What's your secret?
Yep. I pick my meals in a couple taps.
They cook everything, and I choose pickup or delivery.
It is. My family loves it, and I got my weekends back.
Go to MealPrepRevolution dot com and order today.

selectedBed.title: Afro House Candidate 3 — Afro Soul Chant

music.promptAnchor: Upbeat premium Newport Beach Equinox-style dance instrumental, four-on-the-floor groove, polished Afro-house and mellow Latin club feel, elegant not video-game-like, Apple Music quality, clean enough under dialogue, no vocals, no cheesy corporate loop.
music.foleyAnchor: Deep smooth magnetic electronic recumbent-bike resistance whir, low mechanical bass, no clicks, no percussion, tucked under music.

flowsImport.rule: Import only approved locked images, approved audio, and scene prompts. Do not let Flows redesign characters scene by scene.
